programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a home in Rowland Heights, California, that is jam-packed with issues including a large pool in a small backyard.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina find a house in Long Beach, California, with tons of potential. As work begins and problems spring up, they hope they haven't bitten off more than they can chew.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: A Legacy on the Line in Yucatan, Mexico
programs.desc: A longtime dream of owning a generational family compound has a couple uprooting from Texas to Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula. She envisions a picturesque beachfront home, but he wants a spacious backyard that can accommodate a growing family.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: Trading Up to a House in Los Angeles
programs.desc: A real estate savvy couple look to upgrade from their condo to a single-family home in Los Angeles. They need plenty of office space, and she prefers a ranch-style house that's near family, but he wants something grand.

programs.title: Building Roots
programs.desc: A couple's unique, circular home boasts 360-degree windows with stunning wraparound mountain views. But the property lacks function and style. Ben and Cristi take on a challenge they've never faced before: transforming a dome into a home.

programs.title: The Garden Gurus
programs.desc: This week on The Garden Gurus, Bonnie returns with some great tips for potting your favourite varieties and has the ultimate resource for garden recovery. Trev starts his journey along the great European gardens; first stop Hungary.
